module_map.responsibility: Orchestrates the main processing pipeline: entry point coordination, file metadata collection via fetch(), sorting, and display output. Integrates flags, meta, git, icon, and color modules.
Renders Meta entries in grid or tree format. Applies color, icons, and formatting. Manages column alignment, headers, and cell width calculations. Core output formatting logic.

Collects file system metadata for each path entry. Meta::from_path() extracts permissions, size, dates, ownership, links, git status, and creates structured Meta type. Submodules handle specific attributes.
Parses CLI flags and config options. Defines display options (blocks, colors, icons, sorting). Provides structured command-line interface and configuration merging.
Assembles sort functions based on flags. Implements comparison logic for name, size, date, version, extension, and git status. Applied to Meta vectors before display.
Maps file attributes (type, permissions, git status) to terminal colors. Resolves Colors struct from theme configuration. Colorizes output strings.
Resolves file-specific icons based on name, extension, and file type. Supports multiple icon themes and tty detection. Appends icons to output.
Manages color and icon theme configuration loading. Deserializes from YAML config files. Provides default themes and theme switching logic.
Queries git repository status for files. Integrates with git2 library to fetch file status (modified, staged, etc.).
Loads and merges user configuration from config files. Handles home expansion, config paths, YAML parsing. Integrates with theme and flag systems.

data_flow.details: For each file path argument, calls from_path() which queries fs::symlink_metadata(), extracts permissions/size/dates/owner/links/git_status, and constructs structured Meta type. Per-attribute submodules (name.rs, size.rs, etc.) extract individual fields.
If git flag enabled, queries git2::Repository for file statuses (modified, staged, untracked). Attached to Meta.git_status during from_path().

data_flow.key_function: assemble_sorters(&flags) -> Vec<(SortOrder, SortFn)>, then sort(&mut metas, sorters)
data_flow.details: Assembles sorter functions based on --sort flag. Compares Meta entries using name, size, date, version, extension, or git_status. Produces sorted Meta vector.
For each Meta, looks up icon string from icon theme (by extension or name). Icon theme loaded from config. Returns emoji/unicode icon string.
Maps file attributes (filetype, permissions, git_status, ownership) to ContentStyle. Color theme loaded from config. Returns styled color for ANSI output.

data_flow.key_function: get_output(&meta, owner_cache, colors, icons, flags) -> Vec<String>
data_flow.details: For each Meta in blocks order (Permission, User, Group, Size, Date, Name, etc.), renders a cell string by extracting the appropriate field from Meta, applying icon/color, and formatting.

data_flow.key_function: grid(metas, flags, colors, icons) -> String or tree(metas, flags, colors, icons) -> String
data_flow.details: Collects rendered cells into grid (term_grid) or tree structure. Computes column widths, adds headers, aligns columns, then joins rows into final display string.

cross_module_hubs.reason: Central data collection hub. Depends on all meta/* submodules to extract individual file attributes. Called by core.rs during fetch(). Output (Meta type) consumed by sort.rs, display.rs, icon.rs, and color.rs.

Integrates all output dependencies: meta (inputs), flags (display options), color (styling), icon (symbols), owner_cache (user/group names). Final output generation point. Depends on term_grid for layout.
Orchestrator: imports flags, meta, git, icon, color, sort. Coordinates fetch() -> sort() -> display() pipeline. Main entry point linking all modules.

change_proposal.title: Add SHA-256 checksum display column
new_types: Checksum struct with to_string() display logic
change_proposal.pattern_to_follow: Follow meta/* submodule pattern: create meta/checksum.rs with pub fn from_metadata(metadata: &fs::Metadata, path: &Path) -> io::Result<Option<String>> using sha2 crate. Compute SHA-256 only if --checksum flag set or requested in blocks to avoid I/O cost.
change_proposal.integration_point: 1. Add Checksum to Block enum in flags/blocks.rs and get_header() match. 2. In meta/mod.rs::from_path(), conditionally compute checksum and attach to Meta.checksum. 3. In display.rs::get_output(), add case for Block::Checksum that renders Meta.checksum. 4. Optional: add to color.rs Elem enum for themed coloring (e.g., Elem::Checksum for muted/gray style).
risks: Performance: SHA-256 computation on all files with --checksum flag is I/O-intensive. Mitigate by: making flag optional, caching checksums in config, or only computing on request.
Compatibility: Adding Meta.checksum field breaks existing code patterns expecting fixed field count. Mitigate: Option<String> is backwards compatible; test Meta serialization if persistence used.
Output width: 64-char hex digest expands display. Mitigate: add --checksum-short flag for first 8 chars, or trim in tight terminal widths.
Blocksize consistency: ensure checksum block respects Block enum ordering and get_padding_rules() width calculation logic in display.rs.
Testing: add tests for checksum computation, None handling on directories/symlinks, and error cases (permission denied on large files).

tool_usage.params: mode=overview, path=src/, max_depth=2 → directory tree with LOC/function counts
mode=file_details, path=src/core.rs → functions, imports, types in core.rs
mode=file_details, path=src/display.rs → functions, imports, types in display.rs
mode=file_details, path=src/sort.rs → functions, imports, types in sort.rs
mode=file_details, path=src/color.rs → functions, imports, types in color.rs
mode=file_details, path=src/icon.rs → functions, imports, types in icon.rs
mode=file_details, path=src/meta/mod.rs → functions, imports, types in Meta struct
mode=symbol_focus, focus=from_path, follow_depth=2 → call graph for Meta::from_path
mode=symbol_focus, focus=grid, follow_depth=2 → call graph for display::grid
rg queries to find Block enum definition, metadata patterns, icon/color theme integration patterns

analysis_summary.key_insight: lsd follows a strict pipeline: Core orchestrates fetch (Meta collection) → sort (by Flags) → display (with Colors/Icons). Meta is the central data type; display.rs is the final integrator consuming Meta, Flags, Colors, Icons, and owner_cache. Adding a checksum column requires: (1) computing SHA-256 in Meta::from_path(), (2) adding Block::Checksum variant, (3) rendering in display.rs::get_output(). The pattern is established; main risk is I/O performance on large file sets.
analysis_summary.confidence: High - call graph analysis and symbol focus provided complete tracing of from_path → grid data flow.
